subject: [PATCH pynfs v3 21/26] server41tests: test cross-directory rename ADD notification on target

2026-06-19.patch_summary: This patch adds a new test to the server41tests suite, which verifies that a cross-directory rename operation generates an ADD notification on the target directory's delegation. The test creates a source directory and file, opens a delegation on the target directory, renames the file into the delegated target directory, and checks for the correct notifications. This patch is part of the pynfs v3 series and aims to ensure that the NFSv4.1 server correctly handles cross-directory rename operations.
